_meta.name: RobloxXea — Curated Main Tools
_meta.description: Every loadstring in this file has been HTTP-verified to return real Lua source code (HTTP 200 + >1KB) against its canonical GitHub repository. The `verified` and `lastVerified` fields track this — set verified=false if a repo goes dark, and the UI will render a warning chip on the card.
_meta.license: Each tool retains its individual upstream license. See the `repo` field for source.

tools.name: Infinite Yield
tools.author: EdgeIY
tools.description: The most popular universal admin command script for Roblox. 100+ commands including fly, noclip, teleport, player lookups, and a polished command-line interface. Actively maintained for years and the de-facto standard admin script.

tools.name: Unnamed ESP
tools.author: ic3w0lf22
tools.description: High-performance universal ESP using the Drawing API. Draws boxes, names, tracers, and health bars over players. Renowned for clean codebase and low frame impact — the reference implementation most other ESPs fork from.

tools.name: Hydroxide
tools.author: Upbolt
tools.description: All-in-one development toolkit: remote spy, upvalue scanner, constant dumper, and instance explorer. The de-facto standard for reverse-engineering game logic and building automation scripts. Note the default branch is `revision`, not `master`.

tools.name: Fates Admin
tools.author: fatesc
tools.description: A modern plugin-based admin command framework. Polished UI, customizable command set, permission tiers, and an extension API for writing your own commands. Open-source and highly modular — popular choice for game developers who want in-game admin tools.

tools.name: Turtle Spy
tools.author: Turtle-Brand
tools.description: A clean RemoteSpy with a built-in Remote Browser that allows you to select specific remotes to spy on. Simpler than Hydroxide but faster to set up when you just want to log remote traffic. Single-file loadstring, no dependencies.

tools.name: Remote Spy (richie0866)
tools.author: richie0866
tools.description: A modern outgoing RemoteEvent and RemoteFunction viewer with a polished UI. Distributed via GitHub Releases rather than raw source — the loadstring below pulls the latest release bundle automatically. Most-starred remote spy on GitHub.

tools.name: cmd (lxte)
tools.author: lxte
tools.description: A universal Roblox admin script with a clean command bar UI. Lightweight, fast, and oriented toward power users who want a keyboard-driven experience. Active development with regular updates.

tools.name: WindUI
tools.author: Footagesus
tools.description: An open-source modern UI library for Roblox scripts. 280+ stars on GitHub — the most popular UI library in the community right now. Features animated transitions, draggable windows, notifications, and a full widget set (toggles, sliders, dropdowns, keybinds, color pickers).

tools.name: Orion Library
tools.author: OrionLibrary
tools.description: A minimal, fast UI library inspired by modern desktop apps. Provides tabs, sections, toggles, sliders, color pickers, and a built-in search. Zero external dependencies — drop-in for any script that needs a quick control panel.

tools.name: RazLib
tools.author: Razzles5170
tools.description: A clean, loadstring-compatible Roblox UI library with a focus on simplicity and theming. Includes a theme manager, persistent settings, and a small widget set. Great when you want a no-frills panel fast.

tools.name: Parvus
tools.author: AlexR32
tools.description: A free Roblox script hub designed for shooters. Universal aimbot, silent aim, ESP, and per-game modules loaded via the Loader entry point. Active development with a Games folder full of supported titles.

tools.name: Ez Hub
tools.author: debug420
tools.description: An open-source script hub that exploits vulnerabilities in popular Roblox games. Modular — has a Plugins folder where the community can drop in their own modules. Older but still maintained and a good reference for hub architecture.
